16.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it can cause buffer overflow. More critically, in many modern environments, 'gets' is removed entirely, leading to a compilation error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it can cause buffer overflow. More critically, in many modern environments, 'gets' is removed entirely, leading to a compilation error.]

36.reason: [This prints three characters when '-' is not expanded, but the original character before '-' may have already been printed in the previous iteration, causing duplication. Also, if '-' is at position 0, str[i-1] accesses invalid memory.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [This prints three characters when '-' is not expanded, but the original character before '-' may have already been printed in the previous iteration, causing duplication. Also, if '-' is at position 0, str[i-1] accesses invalid memory.]
